legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.updated: Current edition. If there are significant changes, we will publish an update on this page.
legal.privacy.intro: This policy describes how Taska.uz processes personal and contact data when operating the website, application forms and communication with clients.
legal.privacy.s1Body: Through the forms on the site you can submit your name, phone number, e-mail and message text. Technical data (IP, cookie, browser type) may be processed for stability and analytics to the extent necessary for the service to work.
legal.privacy.s2Body: We use the data to respond to requests, support projects, inform about the product and improve the quality of service. Mailing without consent is not carried out.
legal.privacy.s3Body: Data is not for sale. Transfer is possible only to contractors (hosting, analytics, mail) as part of processing on our instructions and subject to confidentiality.
legal.privacy.s4Body: You can request clarification of the processed data or withdrawal of consent by writing to the contact e-mail indicated in the footer of the site. We will respond within a reasonable time.
legal.privacy.disclaimer: The text is for informational purposes only and does not replace individual legal advice. Full edition upon request for legal entities.
legal.terms.title: Terms of use of the site
legal.terms.updated: By using the taska.uz website, you agree to the terms below.
legal.terms.intro: The site is intended for information about the Taska product and services for the development and implementation of systems. The commercial terms of a specific project are fixed in a separate agreement or offer.
legal.terms.s1Body: Site materials (texts, visuals, logo) are protected by law. Copying and commercial use without permission is prohibited, except as expressly permitted by law.
legal.terms.s2Body: The information on the site is provided “as is”. We strive to be up-to-date, but we do not guarantee that it will be error-free. Decisions on implementation are made after a separate assessment for your business.
legal.terms.s3Body: By submitting the form, you confirm the authenticity of the contacts and consent to the processing of data for the purpose of feedback in accordance with the privacy policy.
legal.terms.s4Body: We may update the terms and conditions and publish a new version on this page. We recommend periodically checking the date and text of the document.
legal.terms.disclaimer: Separate applications and NDAs are possible for investors, partners and corporate clients - please request through contacts on the website.
legal.cookies.title: Use of cookies
legal.cookies.updated: Brief description of cookies and similar technologies on the site.
legal.cookies.body: The Site may use cookies and similar technologies to operate sessions, remember language, perform traffic analytics (such as metrics), and improve the experience. You can limit cookies in settings browser; Some functions may work differently.
legal.cookies.s1Body: You can delete or block cookies in your browser. Disabling strict metrics is possible through settings or blockers - check your browser's help.
